candidates.why: This D&A row appears below gross profit within operating expenses, not within the selected COGS bucket of 'Direct costs' plus 'Direct staff costs' above gross profit. It does not look like a COGS-specific line and should not be added to COGS.

This appears asset-specific and not tied to the selected COGS bucket. It does not look like COGS D&A.

variables.notes: Selected COGS rows are 'Direct costs' and 'Direct staff costs' above gross profit. No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown alongside those selected rows. The visible D&A rows sit below gross profit within operating expenses, so they should not be added to COGS.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A component shown below gross profit and outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Staff costs', 'Other external costs', 'Share-Based Compensation'). It should be added separately because the selected XSGA rows explicitly excluded D&A.
This is a separate operating D&A component shown alongside the overhead section, not nested under the selected XSGA component rows. It should be added separately.
Although it is a D&A-labelled row, it relates to discontinued activities and is not an ordinary operating SG&A D&A add-back for this task.
This appears asset-specific and not clearly part of ordinary SG&A overhead. Also largely zero in the preview, so it is not preferred as an SG&A D&A add row.
